Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff State Bar of California's motion for assignment of rights, restraining and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
